chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 459 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case. 1) For order on office objection No. 11. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 3723/24 (stay) 3) For hearing of main case. -------------- 15.05.2025. Mr. Vishwa Mittar, Advocate along with Ms. Reeno, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Iqbal Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. ------------------------ Respondent’s Counsel submits that this matter needs to be remanded to the original officer inasmuch as the Applicant has failed to appear before the said officer and it is only in the appellate proceedings where objections were filed. In view of such position by consent orders impugned are hereby set-aside. Matter stands remanded to the original officer; whereas, the Applicant shall furnish his reply to the notice and thereafter appropriate order may be passed in accordance with law after affording opportunity of hearing to all concerned. Let a copy of this order be sent to Respondent No.1 for compliance. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
